page.content: In analyzing the performance metrics of our e-commerce platform, it is essential to understand the dynamics of seller onboarding growth and its impact on overall marketplace efficiency.

lines.text: In analyzing the performance metrics of our e-commerce platform, it is essential to understand the dynamics of seller
onboarding growth and its impact on overall marketplace efficiency.

page.content: The data table provides insights into key indicators such as New Sellers and Returning Sellers, which are crucial for evaluating our ability to attract and retain a diverse seller base.

lines.text: The data table provides insights into key indicators such as New Sellers and Returning Sellers, which are crucial for evaluating
our ability to attract and retain a diverse seller base.

page.content: A robust influx of new sellers not only enhances the variety of products available to consumers but also contributes to increased Total Revenue, which reached CAD 15 million in the recent reporting period.

lines.text: A robust influx of new sellers not only enhances the variety of products available to consumers but also contributes to increased
Total Revenue, which reached CAD 15 million in the recent reporting period.

page.content: This revenue growth is closely tied to Total Orders, reflecting a significant uptick in consumer engagement and purchase activity. Additionally, the Conversion Rate of 25% indicates a strong alignment between our marketing efforts and customer purchasing behavior, ultimately fostering higher Customer Feedback Scores. These metrics collectively underscore the importance of strategic initiatives aimed at enhancing seller onboarding processes, thus driving sales growth and improving the overall marketplace ecosystem. As we continue to refine our strategies, the interplay between these metrics will be central to sustaining long-term growth and customer satisfaction.
